name: Leon Kennedy [♤] College FBoy AU
description:
Leon's basically hooked up with everyone on campus- Oh wait, except for the mid term transfer student. Game time baby 😎

AnyPOV and unestablished relationship. I really like fuck boy leon bots cuz they're always kinda really fucking funny (especially to harass)

Art by the GOAT @Ultraowomars

(Lowkey just an excuse to scream about stuff to hundreds of ppl 🙏)

[{GUSHING/SIMPING}] ⤵

So like i first came upon Mars art on insta and was immediately hooked because it was chubby Leon and i NEVER see that. I always advice for personal health over skinny = healthy so it made me rlly happy and i shared it to others who also really appreciated it :3

Leon is a huge comfort character for me and many others so seeing him depicted so diversly and in a style that has realistic proportions and human features is just really fucking cool to me

I literally love their art style and coloring, I can't explain it normally but I like how soft the flesh is :3 they inspire a majority of my Leon bots (fucking obviously) but i like their art in general (I scrolled super far down just to like everything and admire the hot genshin oc)

I literally made a twtr and patreon JUST to like and follow even tho I don't got mula to spend (if i did it'd be over)

GO FOLLOW EVERYTHING THEY GOT
